title: Record label streaming tracking
excerpt:

posts.author: comp (Matthew)
posts.cookedHtml:
Part of my business is a record label. We get monthly sales data from our distributors in the form of an csv.

These sheets can have 10k+ lines of data with different payments from different countries on different platforms.

The first three columns are track name, album name and unique track ID. All the other data is variable.

I want a way to upload these csvs to be able to track total earnings by track and by region.

Is this something that monday could do? It feels like a variation of stock tracking but I’m not sure. Any suggestions welcome.

posts.author: JHconsultancy (Joseph Honig)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

How many unique tracks and countries do you have?

You can achive this with make.com you will have to upload the csv to google sheet and from there we can use make.com to combine all the tracks via there track id and country, and then it will import all this data monday.com

Hope this helps

DM me a you want further assistence with this.
